picks.quote: the ground game for Islam is just unstoppable. At least it seems that way right now until someone can stop it, but he's just on a different level
I don't think it would be a good night for Paddy right now against Arman.
I'd be crazy crazy to say that Gable Stevenson is not going to win this fight. He's obviously going to win this fight.
I got to lean towards Adrian Yanez in the numbers... I like Yanez to get the job done by decision
I think Whittaker's going to be well rested... I think this is one Whittaker has got to win. And I think he will
I got to lean towards Terrance McKinney... I think Terrance McKinney is going to land takedowns at some point and utilize the ground and pound.
I think Royval is going to get the job done... I like Royval to get the job done here two rounds to one.
I just think Batist uh is going to pull this thing out... I look for him to get to 18 and three.
I got to go with Paddy the Baddy... but I like Paddy the Baddy too much. He finds ways to win.
I think Max Holloway is going to dominate here on the feet... I like Holloway to get the win.
